caption: A man with dark skin and short dark hair is shown in a close-up shot, speaking toward the camera. He is wearing a white collared shirt and is positioned against the backdrop of a sports stadium with blurred seating and lights visible behind him. The logo of Real Madrid is visible in the top center of the image. Throughout the sequence, the man maintains a similar position, though his facial expressions shift slightly as he speaks, with his mouth opening and closing. Overlaid text appears at the bottom of the screen, consisting of two lines: "haber marcado mi primer gol con el Real Madrid y" and "I scored my first goal with Real Madrid and". The scene remains consistent in lighting and location, with the focus staying entirely on the man's face as he delivers his message.
